title: Mellow Smoky German Zucchini Stir Fry
description: A low calorie, springy stir fry with smoky German spices, sweet caramelized zucchini, and a touch of five spice powder for a lazy Sunday meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat until shimmering.
Add the sliced onion and cook for 2 minutes until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and stir for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add the sliced zucchini, smoked paprika, and German five spice powder, stirring to coat.
Cook the zucchini for 8 minutes, stirring occasionally, until it begins to caramelize.
Pour in the low sodium soy sauce and cook for another 3 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld.
Stir in the lemon zest and cook for 1 more minute for brightness.
Remove from heat and top with fresh parsley if desired.
Serve hot over a bed of steamed rice or enjoy on its own.
